channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump calls it the 'center of the universe.' Mar-a-Lago is a magnet for those seeking influence
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The cars begin lining up early in the morning to be screened by Secret Service agents under white tents near the fence that surrounds President-elect Donald Trump’s vast south Florida estate.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he is planning to attend Jimmy Carter's funeral
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Tuesday that he's planning to attend the funeral of former President Jimmy Carter. Asked about it as he walked into a New Year's Eve party at his Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, Trump responded, "I'll be there.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US imposes sanctions on Russian and Iranian groups over disinformation targeting American voters
item.description: The U.S. has imposed sanctions on two groups linked to Russian and Iranian disinformation campaigns targeting this year's election.
item.dc:creator: David Klepper, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Military Appeals Court rules Defense Sec Austin cannot rescind 9/11 plea deals
item.description: Fox News confirms a military appeals court found Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin exceeded his authority when he tried to nullify the 9/11 plea agreements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden moving to ban oil and gas leases for 20 years in Nevada region, just weeks before Trump inauguration
item.description: President Biden is moving to restrict oil and gas leases in the Ruby Mountains for 20 years, a plan proposed just weeks before President-elect Donald Trump is set to take office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 118th Congress was one of the least productive in over 30 years
item.description: The outgoing Congress enacted fewer than 210 bills into law over the last two years, with most enacted in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Elina Shirazi, NewsNation

item.title: Hemp industry relieved after temporary pause on Tennessee regulations
item.description: Tennessee hemp growers and retailers are breathing a sigh of relief after a judge temporarily paused new rules.
item.dc:creator: Tori Gessner, NewsNation

item.title: Speaker math: Breaking down how many votes Johnson needs to keep his gavel
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) heads to the House floor on Friday in hopes of being formally reelected Speaker. While Johnson has the endorsement of President-elect Trump to remain Speaker, one Republican is pledging to oppose him, and several others are not committing to supporting Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: The rise in mail voting comes with a price, as mismatched signatures lead to ballot rejections
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — As with many voters on Maui, Joshua Kamalo thought the race for president wasn't the only big contest on the November ballot. He also was focused on a hotly contested seat for the local governing board.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY and AYANNA ALEXANDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transgender trailblazer Sarah McBride heads to her debut in Congress, hoping for a touch of grace
item.description: DOVER, Del. (AP) — It was her last day in session as a Delaware state senator, and Sarah McBride sat in her tiny office at the state Capitol, preparing farewell remarks. She had made history here, as the first openly transgender state senator in the country.
item.dc:creator: TIFFANY STANLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carter helped shape modern day border policies, former aide says
item.description: He described how Carter treated everyone with respect, but "not the kind of guy you could pull a fast one on, he was very smart and a very tough boss.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, NewsNation

item.title: ICE shuts down programs offering services to illegal immigrants, citing ‘immense’ costs
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement says it has stopped two programs related to service for illegal immigrants as they did not align with the agency's mission.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jimmy Carter is being mourned in his tiny hometown and around the world
item.description: Tributes to former President Jimmy Carter are pouring in from his small hometown of Plains, Georgia, and around the world.
item.dc:creator: Russ Bynum, Sharon Johnson And Bill Barrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Biden announces nearly $2.5 billion more in military aid for Ukraine
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden said Monday that the United States will send nearly $2.5 billion more in weapons to Ukraine as his administration works quickly to spend all the money it has available to help Kyiv fight off Russia before President-elect Donald Trump takes office.
item.dc:creator: TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An appeals court upholds a $5 million award in a sexual abuse verdict against President-elect Trump
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal appeals court on Monday upheld a jury’s finding in a civil case that Donald Trump sexually abused a columnist in an upscale department store dressing room in the mid-1990s. The 2nd U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ford Museum will open display honoring Jimmy Carter's life
item.description: After the death of former President Jimmy Carter, the Gerald R. Ford Museum in Grand Rapids is opening a new display to commemorate his life.
item.dc:creator: Anna Skog, NewsNation

item.title: How American presidents have planned their own funerals
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jimmy Carter's memorial journey will end at his house in the tiny town of Plains, Georgia, where he grew up on a peanut farm. That is where his wife, Rosalynn, was laid to rest last year in a burial plot that they chose years ago.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Carter 'was most impactful one-term president': Stuart Eizenstat
item.description: He also credited Carter for initiating defense programs that would later be associated with the Reagan administration.
item.dc:creator: Blake Burman, NewsNation

item.title: Baja to lease warehouse space to house deported migrants
item.description: He also stated the warehouse location will have easier access from the ports of entry where migrants might be deported instead of having to bus them to several areas in the city.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, Fox 5

item.title: Trump has pressed for voting changes. GOP majorities in Congress will try to make that happen
item.description: Republicans plan to move quickly in their effort to overhaul the nation’s voting procedures, seeing an opportunity with control of the White House and both chambers of Congress to push through long-sought changes that include voter ID and proof-of-citizenship requirements.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
